testcase.name: Services Management - Normal Flows creates a new service and shows it in the list
testcase.classname: creates a new service and shows it in the list

testcase.name: Services Management - Normal Flows displays service details correctly after creation
testcase.classname: displays service details correctly after creation

failure.message:
Timed out retrying after 10000ms: expected '<tr>' to be 'visible'
This element `<tr>` is not visible because its ancestor has `position: fixed` CSS property and it is overflowed by other elements. How about scrolling to the element with `cy.scrollIntoView()`?

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: Timed out retrying after 10000ms: expected '<tr>' to be 'visible'
This element `<tr>` is not visible because its ancestor has `position: fixed` CSS property and it is overflowed by other elements. How about scrolling to the element with `cy.scrollIntoView()`? at Object.clickByTestId (webpack://kong-ui-test/./cypress/support/utils/elementUtils.js:11:28) at ServicesOverviewPage.selectService (webpack://kong-ui-test/./cypress/support/pages/ServicesOverviewPage.js:11:21) at Context.eval (webpack://kong-ui-test/./cypress/e2e/service.normal.cy.js:25:25)

testcase.name: Services Management - Normal Flows deletes a service from its detail view
testcase.classname: deletes a service from its detail view

failure.message:
Timed out retrying after 10000ms: expected '<button.k-button.small.tertiary.icon-button.actions-dropdown-trigger>' to be 'visible'
This element `<button.k-button.small.tertiary.icon-button.actions-dropdown-trigger>` is not visible because its ancestor has `position: fixed` CSS property and it is overflowed by other elements. How about scrolling to the element with `cy.scrollIntoView()`?

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: Timed out retrying after 10000ms: expected '<button.k-button.small.tertiary.icon-button.actions-dropdown-trigger>' to be 'visible'
This element `<button.k-button.small.tertiary.icon-button.actions-dropdown-trigger>` is not visible because its ancestor has `position: fixed` CSS property and it is overflowed by other elements. How about scrolling to the element with `cy.scrollIntoView()`? at Object.click (webpack://kong-ui-test/./cypress/support/utils/elementUtils.js:16:28) at ServicesOverviewPage.deleteService (webpack://kong-ui-test/./cypress/support/pages/ServicesOverviewPage.js:28:21) at Context.eval (webpack://kong-ui-test/./cypress/e2e/service.normal.cy.js:37:25)

testcase.name: Services Management - Normal Flows cancels add service operation without creating

testcase.name: Services Management - Normal Flows creates a service with both name and tags empty and receives auto-generated name
